title: Argentina Visa Application (Formulario de Solicitud de Visado, FSV)
description: Argentina's Ministerio de Relaciones Exteriores, Comercio Internacional y Culto (Cancillería)'s standard visa application form, the 'Formulario de Solicitud de Visado' (FSV), submitted at Argentine embassies and consulates abroad by foreign nationals applying for any category of Argentine visa (permanent, temporary, or transitory — a classification the consular officer, not the applicant, records on page 3). This document models Cancillería's own central fillable-AcroForm specimen ('fsv_2024_espanol_editable.pdf'): 3 pages, 50 '/Tx' text-field widgets, independently confirmed via pdfjs-dist's getFieldObjects()/getAnnotations() (not assumed from a prior scouting count). The form's own printed field numbering (1-50, plus an un-widgeted signature line at 51) is used directly as this document's sourceRef anchor: each of the 50 numbered boxes on pages 1-2 maps one-to-one to exactly one AcroForm widget, confirmed by cross-walking every widget's rectangle position against that page's own text layer (29 widgets/page 1, 21 widgets/page 2, 0 widgets/page 3). A byte-different but structurally identical 2026 edition mirrored at an Argentine consulate's own domain (cmila.cancilleria.gob.ar) was independently re-fetched and re-extracted and found to carry the same 3-page, 50-field, 29/21/0-widgets-per-page layout, confirming the form is stable across editions. Page 3 is headed 'Espacio para uso exclusivo del funcionario consular' (space reserved exclusively for the consular officer — visa category, migratory criteria, visa validity, authorized length of stay, single/multiple entry, and the consul's own opinion) and carries zero AcroForm widgets of its own, independently confirmed rather than assumed, so it is out of scope for this applicant-facing document. Field 51 ('Firma del solicitante y aclaración') is a wet-ink signature line with no corresponding AcroForm widget; it is modelled instead as a 'documents[]' attestation citing the form's own printed banner declaration ('DECLARACIÓN JURADA. SU FALSEDAD CONLLEVA EXPULSIÓN Y PROHIBICIÓN DE REINGRESO' — sworn declaration; a false statement carries expulsion and a ban on re-entry). The form's own instruction ('► Completar hasta campo 50') is treated as the source's own claim that every one of fields 1-50 is meant to be completed; nine fields whose content is inherently inapplicable to many applicants (other names/aliases at field 3; the Lebanese-origin-only family registry number at field 11; employer, work phone, and activity-and-position at fields 19/20/23 for applicants with no current employer; references in Argentina at field 26; and spouse, children, and relatives residing in Argentina at fields 30/31/39) are nonetheless modelled here as optional — a disclosed scope judgment, not a source-asserted exemption (see VERIFICATION.md). The source PDF itself states that the list of supporting documentation required alongside this form is furnished to the applicant through a separate channel, not printed on this specimen ('El listado de esa documentación ha sido proporcionado previamente al solicitante de la visa'), so no supporting-document checklist beyond the photograph and signature is invented here. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Argentine Republic, the Ministerio de Relaciones Exteriores, Comercio Internacional y Culto, or any Argentine embassy or consulate.

authority.name: Ministerio de Relaciones Exteriores, Comercio Internacional y Culto (Cancillería), acting through Argentina's embassies and consulates abroad

source.documentRef: 'FSV – Formulario de Solicitud de Visa' ('Visa Application Form'), Ministerio de Relaciones Exteriores, Comercio Internacional y Culto (Cancillería), 3-page fillable-AcroForm PDF hosted centrally at cancilleria.gob.ar; also mirrored (byte-different, structurally identical) at Argentina's Los Angeles consulate's own domain, https://cmila.cancilleria.gob.ar/userfiles/fsv_editable_espanol_-_2026_1.pdf

verification.notes: GOV-2179: opens Argentina's Visa vertical (2nd of 6 verticals, after Business Formation/GOV-2169). Fetched fresh with a browser User-Agent directly from cancilleria.gob.ar (HTTP 200, content-type application/pdf, 311,233 bytes) and cross-checked against the 2026 consulate mirror (HTTP 200, application/pdf, 378,338 bytes) — both byte counts independently reproduced the prior scouting pass's numbers, not merely trusted from it. Extracted with pdfjs-dist getDocument()/getFieldObjects()/getAnnotations()/getTextContent() (position-based label attribution): numPages === 3 on both editions; getFieldObjects() resolves exactly 50 distinct field names on both editions (all generic 'TextoN' AcroForm names, N=1..50, carrying no descriptive internal name); getAnnotations() confirms 50 total Widget-subtype annotations split 29/21/0 across pages 1/2/3 on both editions. The form's own printed numbering (1-50) was cross-walked one-to-one against these 50 widgets by rectangle position versus the page's own text layer — every numbered item from 1 through 50 maps to exactly one widget, with no unmatched widget and no unmatched printed number in that range. Field 51 ('Firma del solicitante y aclaración') has no AcroForm widget on either edition (a wet-ink signature line), and page 3 (the consular-officer-only section) has zero widgets on either edition — both independently reconfirmed, not assumed. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record, every field's citation, the nine disclosed optional-field scope judgments, and the mock conformance test run.

fields.name: surname
fields.label: Surname(s) (as in passport)
fields.sourceRef: '1. APELLIDOS' — 'como en el pasaporte'

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: First name(s) (as in passport)
fields.sourceRef: '2. NOMBRES DE PILA' — 'como en el pasaporte'

fields.name: otherNamesOrAliases
fields.label: Other names or surnames (maiden, religious, professional name, or alias)
fields.description: Modelled as optional: inherently inapplicable to applicants with no maiden/religious/professional name or alias, though the source form's own blanket 'complete up to field 50' instruction technically requests an entry here too (see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: '3. OTROS NOMBRES O APELLIDOS' — 'de soltera, religioso, profesional, alias'

fields.name: fatherFullName
fields.label: Father's details (surname, first name)
fields.sourceRef: '4. PADRE' — 'apellidos, nombres'

fields.name: motherFullName
fields.label: Mother's details (surname, first name)
fields.sourceRef: '5. MADRE' — 'apellidos, nombres'

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex
fields.sourceRef: '6. SEXO' — 'M o F'

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.sourceRef: '7. FECHA DE NACIMIENTO' — 'dd/mm/aaaa'

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Place of birth (city, province, country)
fields.sourceRef: '8. LUGAR DE NACIMIENTO' — 'ciudad, provincia, país'

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: Nationality (current and, if different, at birth)
fields.sourceRef: '9. NACIONALIDAD' — 'actual (y, si existe, la de origen)'

fields.name: identityOrResidenceDocument
fields.label: Identity or residence document, type and number
fields.sourceRef: '10. DOCUMENTO DE IDENTIDAD O RESIDENCIA, TIPO, №'

fields.name: lebaneseFamilyRegistryNumber
fields.label: Lebanese family registry number (only if of Lebanese origin)
fields.description: The source form itself narrowly scopes this field to applicants of Lebanese origin ('sólo en caso de origen libanés') — a genuine, source-stated exemption, not an inferred one.
fields.sourceRef: '11. № DE REGISTRO LIBANÉS DE FAMILIA' — 'sólo en caso de origen libanés'

fields.name: homeAddress
fields.label: Home address
fields.sourceRef: '12. DOMICILIO PARTICULAR'

fields.name: homePhone
fields.label: Home telephone number
fields.sourceRef: '13. TELÉFONO PARTICULAR'

fields.name: email
fields.label: E-mail address
fields.sourceRef: '14. DIRECCIÓN DE CORREO ELECTRÓNICO'

fields.name: mobilePhone
fields.label: Mobile telephone number
fields.sourceRef: '15. TELÉFONO CELULAR'

fields.name: passportTypeAndNumber
fields.label: Passport type and number
fields.sourceRef: '16. TIPO Y № DE PASAPORTE'

fields.name: passportIssuingCountryAndDate
fields.label: Passport issuing country and date of issue
fields.description: The source presents issuing country and issue date as one continuous free-text box rather than as two separately-rectangled boxes, so it is modelled as a single string field rather than split into a country field plus a date field the source itself does not separate.
fields.sourceRef: '17. PAÍS EMISOR Y FECHA DE EMISIÓN'

fields.name: passportExpiryDate
fields.label: Passport expiry date
fields.sourceRef: '18. FECHA DE VENCIMIENTO' — 'dd/mm/aaaa'

fields.name: employer
fields.label: Employer
fields.description: Modelled as optional: inapplicable to applicants with no current employer (e.g. retirees, students, homemakers).
fields.sourceRef: '19. EMPLEADOR'

fields.name: workPhone
fields.label: Work telephone number
fields.description: Modelled as optional for the same reason as 'employer'.
fields.sourceRef: '20. TELÉFONO LABORAL'

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: Marital status
fields.description: The source provides a single blank box with no printed checkbox options for this item; the applicant writes their own marital-status description (e.g. 'soltero', 'casado', 'divorciado').
fields.sourceRef: '21. ESTADO CIVIL'

fields.name: profession
fields.label: Profession
fields.sourceRef: '22. PROFESIÓN'

fields.name: activityAndPosition
fields.label: Current activity and position/title
fields.description: Modelled as optional for the same reason as 'employer' — a more specific employment detail than 'profession', inapplicable to the non-employed.
fields.sourceRef: '23. ACTIVIDAD Y CARGO'

fields.name: reasonForTravel
fields.label: Reason for travel
fields.sourceRef: '24. MOTIVO DEL VIAJE'

fields.name: durationOfStay
fields.label: Intended duration of stay
fields.description: The source provides one free-text box (no separate numeric-days sub-box), so this is modelled as a string rather than an invented integer-days field.
fields.sourceRef: '25. PLAZO DE ESTADÍA'

fields.name: referencesInArgentina
fields.label: References in Argentina (persons, companies, address, e-mail, telephone)
fields.description: Modelled as optional: many applicants (e.g. first-time tourists) have no personal or business references in Argentina to list.
fields.sourceRef: '26. REFERENCIAS EN LA ARGENTINA' — 'personas, empresas, dirección, email, teléfono'

fields.name: accommodationInArgentina
fields.label: Place of accommodation in Argentina (address and telephone)
fields.sourceRef: '27. LUGAR DE ALOJAMIENTO EN LA ARGENTINA' — 'dirección y teléfono'

fields.name: arrivalDateInArgentina
fields.label: Date of arrival in Argentina
fields.sourceRef: '28. FECHA DE LLEGADA A LA ARGENTINA' — 'dd/mm/aaaa'

fields.name: departureDateFromArgentina
fields.label: Date of departure from Argentina
fields.sourceRef: '29. FECHA DE PARTIDA DE LA ARGENTINA' — 'dd/mm/aaaa'

fields.name: spouseDetails
fields.label: Spouse's details (surname, first name, nationality, date of birth; travelling with applicant?)
fields.description: Modelled as optional: inapplicable to unmarried applicants.
fields.sourceRef: '30. CÓNYUGE' — 'apellidos, nombres, nacionalidad, fecha de nacimiento, ¿viaja con usted?'

fields.name: childrenDetails
fields.label: Children's details (surname, first name, nationality, date of birth; travelling with applicant?)
fields.description: Modelled as optional: inapplicable to applicants with no children. The source provides one large box for all children rather than a repeating per-child structure (v0.3 has no repeating-group construct — GSP-0009 remains a tracked future addition).
fields.sourceRef: '31. HIJOS' — 'apellidos, nombres, nacionalidad, fecha de nacimiento, ¿viajan con usted?'

fields.name: previouslyAppliedArgentineVisa
fields.label: Previously applied for an Argentine visa?
fields.description: The source widget is a plain '/Tx' text field carrying the hint 'SI o NO' (not a checkbox/radio button), so the applicant literally types 'SI' or 'NO'; this is modelled as a semantic boolean per SPEC.md §6.2, with the underlying free-text mechanism disclosed here rather than overclaimed as a checkbox.
fields.sourceRef: '32. ¿SOLICITÓ USTED VISA ARGENTINA ANTERIORMENTE?' — 'SI o NO'

fields.name: previousVisaApplicationDate
fields.label: Date of the previous visa application
fields.sourceRef: '33. ¿CUÁNDO LA SOLICITÓ?' — 'dd/mm/aaaa'

fields.name: previousVisaApplicationPlace
fields.label: Place of the previous visa application (country, city)
fields.sourceRef: '34. ¿DÓNDE LA SOLICITÓ?' — 'país, ciudad'

fields.name: enteredWithPreviousVisa
fields.label: Did you enter Argentina with that previous visa?
fields.description: Same free-text 'SI o NO' widget mechanism as 'previouslyAppliedArgentineVisa'. Positioned immediately after the previous-visa-application block (fields 32-34) with no independent gating field of its own, so it is modelled as conditionally required only when a previous visa application is disclosed.
fields.sourceRef: '35. ¿INGRESÓ CON LA VISA?' — 'SI o NO'

fields.name: previousVisaEntryDate
fields.label: Date of entry with the previous visa
fields.sourceRef: '36. ¿CUÁNDO INGRESÓ?' — 'dd/mm/aaaa'

fields.name: previousVisaStayDuration
fields.label: Duration of that previous stay
fields.sourceRef: '37. PLAZO DE ESA ESTADÍA'

fields.name: previousVisitReason
fields.label: Reason for that previous visit
fields.sourceRef: '38. MOTIVO DE ESA VISITA'

fields.name: relativesResidingInArgentina
fields.label: Spouse, fiancé(e), siblings, parents, or other relatives residing in Argentina (who, address, telephone)
fields.description: Modelled as optional: the source's own hint text ('quién, dirección, teléfono') calls for a free-text answer rather than a plain 'SI o NO' toggle, and many applicants have no such relatives.
fields.sourceRef: '39. ¿RESIDEN EN LA ARGENTINA SU CÓNYUGE, NOVIO, HERMANOS, PADRES, PARIENTES?' — 'quién, dirección, teléfono'

fields.name: residenceHistoryLast3Years
fields.label: Cities and dates of residence over the last 3 years, starting with the current one
fields.sourceRef: '40. ENUMERE LAS CIUDADES Y FECHAS DONDE RESIDIÓ EN LOS ÚLTIMOS 3 AÑOS, COMENZANDO POR LA ACTUAL'

fields.name: deniedEntryExpelledOrReentryBanned
fields.label: Previously denied entry to Argentina, expelled from it, or banned from re-entry?
fields.description: Same free-text 'SI o NO' widget mechanism as 'previouslyAppliedArgentineVisa'.
fields.sourceRef: '41. ¿SE LE DENEGÓ ANTES EL INGRESO A LA ARGENTINA, O FUE EXPULSADO DE ELLA, O SE LE PROHIBIÓ EL REINGRESO EN ELLA?' — 'SI o NO'

fields.name: attemptedIllegalEntry
fields.label: Attempted to enter Argentina evading migratory control, or at a place/time not authorized for it?
fields.description: Same free-text 'SI o NO' widget mechanism as 'previouslyAppliedArgentineVisa'.
fields.sourceRef: '42. ¿HA INTENTADO INGRESAR A LA ARGENTINA ELUDIENDO EL CONTROL MIGRATORIO, O POR LUGAR O EN HORARIO NO HABILITADOS AL EFECTO?' — 'SI o NO'

fields.name: convictedTraffickingOrSeriousCrime
fields.label: Convicted (even if pardoned or amnestied) of arms/human trafficking, drug trafficking, money laundering, investment in illicit activities, or a crime carrying 3+ years' imprisonment?
fields.description: Same free-text 'SI o NO' widget mechanism as 'previouslyAppliedArgentineVisa'.
fields.sourceRef: '43. ¿FUE CONDENADO (AUN CUANDO HAYA RECIBIDO PERDÓN O AMNISTÍA O SIMILAR) POR DELITO DE TRÁFICO DE ARMAS, DE PERSONAS, DE ESTUPEFACIENTES, LAVADO DE DINERO, INVERSIONES EN ACTIVIDADES ILÍCITAS O DELITOS SANCIONADOS CON 3 AÑOS O MÁS DE PENA PRIVATIVA DE LA LIBERTAD?' — 'SI o NO'

fields.name: involvedInGenocideWarCrimesTerrorism
fields.label: Incurred in or participated in acts of government or otherwise constituting genocide, war crimes, acts of terrorism, or crimes against humanity, or any other act triable by the International Criminal Court?
fields.description: Same free-text 'SI o NO' widget mechanism as 'previouslyAppliedArgentineVisa'.
fields.sourceRef: '44. ¿HA INCURRIDO O PARTICIPADO EN ACTOS DE GOBIERNO O DE OTRO TIPO, QUE CONSTITUYAN GENOCIDIO, CRÍMENES DE GUERRA, ACTOS DE TERRORISMO O DELITOS DE LESA HUMANIDAD, O DE OTRO ACTO SUSCEPTIBLE DE SER JUZGADO POR EL TRIBUNAL PENAL INTERNACIONAL?' — 'SI o NO'

fields.name: terroristActivityOrOrganizationRecord
fields.label: Record of terrorist activity, or of belonging to an organization recognized as implicated in acts triable by the International Criminal Court or under Law 23,077 (Defense of Democracy)?
fields.description: Same free-text 'SI o NO' widget mechanism as 'previouslyAppliedArgentineVisa'.
fields.sourceRef: '45. ¿TIENE ANTECEDENTES POR ACTIVIDAD TERRORISTA O POR PERTENECER A ORGANIZACIONES RECONOCIDAS COMO IMPUTADAS DE ACCIONES SUSCEPTIBLES DE SER JUZGADAS POR EL TRIBUNAL PENAL INTERNACIONAL O POR LA LEY 23077, DE DEFENSA DE LA DEMOCRACIA?' — 'SI o NO'

fields.name: falseDocumentationForMigratoryBenefit
fields.label: Convicted in Argentina or with a record of having submitted materially or ideologically false documentation to obtain, for self or a third party, a migratory benefit?
fields.description: Same free-text 'SI o NO' widget mechanism as 'previouslyAppliedArgentineVisa'.
fields.sourceRef: '46. ¿FUE CONDENADO EN LA ARGENTINA O TUVO ANTECEDENTES POR HABER PRESENTADO DOCUMENTACIÓN MATERIAL O IDEOLÓGICAMENTE FALSA PARA OBTENER, PARA SÍ O PARA UN TERCERO, UN BENEFICIO MIGRATORIO?' — 'SI o NO'

fields.name: prostitutionRelatedRecord
fields.label: Promotes prostitution, profits from it, has been convicted or has a record of having promoted prostitution, profited from it, or engaging in activities related to trafficking or sexual exploitation of persons?
fields.description: Same free-text 'SI o NO' widget mechanism as 'previouslyAppliedArgentineVisa'.
fields.sourceRef: '47. ¿PROMUEVE LA PROSTITUCIÓN, LUCRA CON ELLO, HA SIDO CONDENADO O TIENE ANTECEDENTES POR HABER PROMOVIDO LA PROSTITUCIÓN, POR HABER LUCRADO CON ELLO, O POR DESARROLLAR ACTIVIDADES RELACIONADAS CON EL TRÁFICO O LA EXPLOTACIÓN SEXUAL DE PERSONAS?' — 'SI o NO'

fields.name: facilitatingIllegalEntryRecord
fields.label: Convicted in Argentina or with a record of promoting or facilitating the illegal entry, stay, or exit of foreigners in Argentine territory?
fields.description: Same free-text 'SI o NO' widget mechanism as 'previouslyAppliedArgentineVisa'.
fields.sourceRef: '48. ¿FUE CONDENADO EN LA ARGENTINA O TUVO ANTECEDENTES POR PROMOVER O FACILITAR EL INGRESO, PERMANENCIA O EGRESO ILEGALES DE EXTRANJEROS EN EL TERRITORIO ARGENTINO?' — 'SI o NO'

fields.name: believesSubjectToMigratoryImpediment
fields.label: Believes they may be subject to any impediment sanctioned by Argentine migratory regulations?
fields.description: Same free-text 'SI o NO' widget mechanism as 'previouslyAppliedArgentineVisa'.
fields.sourceRef: '49. ¿CREE USTED QUE PUEDE ESTAR INCURSO EN ALGÚN IMPEDIMENTO SANCIONADO POR LA NORMATIVA MIGRATORIA ARGENTINA?' — 'SI o NO'

fields.name: signaturePlaceAndDate
fields.label: City and date of the application
fields.description: The source provides one free-text box for both the city and the date together (no separately-rectangled date sub-box), so this is modelled as a single string field rather than split into city and date fields the source itself does not separate.
fields.sourceRef: '50. CIUDAD Y FECHA DE LA SOLICITUD'

documents.label: Applicant's colour photograph (4x4 cm, white background)
documents.sourceRef: Page 3 placeholder box — 'Foto color', '4x4 cm', 'fondo blanco'

documents.label: Signature of the applicant, with printed name
documents.statement: Paraphrased from the form's own printed banner declaration (not a verbatim quote of a longer paragraph — the source's declaration is this one short banner, not a multi-paragraph text): this is a sworn declaration ('declaración jurada'), and any falsehood in it carries expulsion from Argentina and a ban on re-entry.
documents.sourceRef: '51. FIRMA DEL SOLICITANTE Y ACLARACIÓN', per the form's page-1 banner 'DECLARACIÓN JURADA. SU FALSEDAD CONLLEVA EXPULSIÓN Y PROHIBICIÓN DE REINGRESO'
